name: Cou-Cou
recipeIngredient: 1 Small fresh hot pepper, seeded & minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the stems and slice the okras diagonally into 1/4-inch rings.
2. In a heavy saucepan, bring 3 cups of water to a boil.
3. Add the okra, hot pepper, and salt to taste. Boil for about 10 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, sift the cornmeal into a bowl and add the remaining 3 cups of water. Mix well.
5. Remove the saucepan from heat and combine the mixture.
6. Return to medium heat and stir frequently until the mixture is smooth and thick.
7. Turn out onto a plate and spread the butter on top.
8. Serve hot.
Yield: 6 servings
